## Summary

<!-- Describe the changes and why they are needed. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `npm run changelog` reviewed (do not edit `CHANGELOG.md` by hand)
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
